difficulty.reason: Nearly indestructible, own pot prevents invasion, daily sensory route stop

growth_stages.name: Establishment
growth_stages.look_for: Fresh green leaves in pot, growing outward quickly

prompt.en: Rub a leaf and smell your hand -- MINT! The freshest smell in the garden!
prompt.da: Gnub et blad og lugt paa din haand -- MYNTE! Den friskeste duft i haven!

growth_stages.name: Full Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Bushy plant filling the pot, very aromatic

prompt.en: Pick a few leaves for your water glass -- fancy mint water! Or we'll make hot chocolate with mint!
prompt.da: Pluk et par blade til dit vandglas -- flot myntevand! Eller vi laver varm kakao med mynte!

growth_stages.name: Late Season
growth_stages.look_for: Growth slowing, may flower with small purple spikes

prompt.en: Give the mint a big haircut before winter -- it'll grow back even bushier next year!
prompt.da: Giv mynten en stor klipning foer vinteren -- den vokser endnu taettere naeste aar!

human_readable.en: Keep pot moist. Water daily in warm weather -- pots dry out fast.
human_readable.da: Hold potten fugtig. Vand dagligt i varmt vejr -- potter toerrer hurtigt ud.

harvest.notes: Perennial in pot. NOT in bed -- invasive. Part of daily sensory route: lamb's ear (touch) -> lemon balm (crush) -> mint (smell).

companion_plants.notes: Kept in own pot outside bed. No companion interactions. Invasive if planted in ground.

message.en: The mint pot is drying out -- water it! Pots need daily watering in summer.
message.da: Myntepotten toerrer ud -- vand den! Potter har brug for dagligt vand om sommeren.
